headline: National Expressway Grid Costs RM85 Billion Over 15 Years
context: Government announced 15-year National Expressway Grid costing RM85 billion to add 2,400km of new highway corridors.

cards.big: RM85 billion expressway grid to add 2,400km over 15 years
cards.sub: Critics question highway-centric approach as climate policies favour transit

cards.big: Plan includes 4 new inter-state corridors connecting east and west coast
cards.sub: East Coast corridor accounts for RM28 billion of the total

cards.big: EIA required for 1,800km passing through forested areas
cards.sub: Conservation groups estimate 45,000 hectares of forest clearance

cards.big: World Bank recommended Malaysia shift 60% of transport to public transit
cards.sub: Current allocation remains 72% highway and 28% public transport in 2026

cards.big: Highway expansion tests whether transport investment matches climate commitments
RM85 billion expressway grid over 15 years. Highway-centric planning locks in car dependency for decades.
